					<h2><span class="small">Personal Injury</span> HIGH-STAKES CASES NEED A HIGH-QUALITY LAW FIRM</h2>
<p>No matter how complicated the case, our <em>personal injury accident lawyers in Houston</em> know what to do to ensure justice is served.</p>
<p>Personal injury cases require diligent investigation and legal expertise to not only prove negligence but to effectively communicate your story and the pain and suffering you've experienced. That is what we accomplish.</p>

<div class="mod_home_testimonial viewport container" data-s3-module="">
	<div class="row ">
		<div class="swiper-container">
			<h2>
				<span class="small line white">Words From Our Clients</span>
			</h2>
			<div class="swiper home-testimonial-swiper swiper-initialized swiper-horizontal swiper-pointer-events swiper-backface-hidden">
				<div class="swiper-wrapper" style="transition-duration: 0ms; transform: translate3d(-750px, 0px, 0px);" id="swiper-wrapper-f48777e9730ff2f9" aria-live="polite"><div class="swiper-slide swiper-slide-duplicate swiper-slide-prev" id="testimonial-3" data-swiper-slide-index="2" role="group" aria-label="3 / 3" style="width: 700px; margin-right: 50px;">
							<div class="text">
								<h3>If you are looking for true professionalism and honesty, look no further than Perdue and Kidd.</h3>
								<p>Just wanted to give a quick review for the law firm, Perdue and Kidd. I retained them for a slip and fall injury accident that I recently suffered and I would highly recommend them to anyone needing a personal injury lawyer.

My lawyer Michael Clinton was so knowledgeable, dedicated, and professional and was always available any time I had questions or needed info and more importantly, he actually took the time to get to know me and my family. He went beyond what was expected and worked hard to make sure I was compensated fairly.

If you are looking for true professionalism and honesty, look no further than Perdue and Kidd and Michael Clinton.</p>
								<span class="author">Donna Pruitt, Personal Injury</span>
							</div>
						</div>
											<div class="swiper-slide swiper-slide-active" id="testimonial-1" data-swiper-slide-index="0" style="width: 700px; margin-right: 50px;" role="group" aria-label="1 / 3">
							<div class="text">
								<h3>I made the best decision hiring Perdue & Kidd to help me get through my car accident.</h3>
								<p>It was painless in the sense that Don Kidd and Adam Blake took care of everything. Initially, I tried to go about the process of getting my car and medical bills settled on my own—but I got nowhere.  Adam Blake took over and settled my case a lot sooner than I thought possible.</p>
								<span class="author">Danyell Wilkerson, Personal Injury</span>
							</div>
						</div>
											<div class="swiper-slide swiper-slide-next" id="testimonial-2" data-swiper-slide-index="1" style="width: 700px; margin-right: 50px;" role="group" aria-label="2 / 3">
							<div class="text">
								<h3>I highly recommend this firm and I am extremely grateful for the job they did.</h3>
								<p>Perdue & Kidd were more than efficient when it came to solving my case. Adam Blake and his team did more than an amazing job on this case. They were smart, sharp, communicative, and most of all patient.
I was extremely pleased and amazed by the way the firm was able to handle and win the case. Having to work with a client living abroad and documents from a foreign country in a foreign language.
I was extremely nervous about going through this process but I was guided throughout this journey and answered every single question regarding legal terms and what I was entitled to.

I highly recommend this firm and I am extremely thankful for the job they did.</p>

					<h2><span class="small">WHY WE DO IT</span> WE BELIEVE IN YOUR RIGHTS</h2>
<p><strong>The 7th Amendment in the Bill of Rights guarantees every American, even non-citizens, the right to justice when another’s actions or negligence have seriously harmed them.</strong></p>
<p>Every day, Perdue & Kidd fight to exercise this basic right on behalf of our clients. Beyond the courtrooms and cases we work on, every <em>personal injury accident attorney in Houston</em> at Perdue & Kidd is also active in leadership roles in local, state, or national associations that work to protect the 7th Amendment for all of us. We do it because we care. We do it because your rights matter.</p>
